HGSS.682.0001:
You’re the best I’ve ever battled!\f
Huh? You’re the one who saved all
the SLOWPOKE?\f
Well, no wonder I couldn’t beat you!
Would it be OK to get your number?\f
I don’t want to miss anything you
do from now on! [0200,0000]
HGSS.682.0002:
Wow! Gee, thanks!\f
Now I can call you anytime, whether
anything’s up or not.\f
You know, just to chat!
HGSS.682.0003:
Oh, but...
I’m not dangerous!\f
I just want to call and chat about
everything and nothing!
HGSS.682.0004: You will tell me your phone number?[0200,0000]
HGSS.682.0006:
[0103,0000,0000], have you heard?\f
Goldenrod’s Radio Tower has been taken
over by Team Rocket!\f
...Um... What’s Team Rocket?
HGSS.682.0007:
[0103,0000,0000], have you heard?\f
Goldenrod’s Radio Tower has been taken
over by Team Rocket!\f
...Um... What’s Team Rocket?
HGSS.682.0008:
[0103,0000,0000], I heard!
You defeated Whitney?\f
It makes me proud to be your friend!
Call you later!
HGSS.682.0009:
[0103,0000,0000], I heard!
You defeated Whitney?\f
It makes me proud to be your friend!
Call you later!
HGSS.682.0010:
I saw, I heard!\f
You beat Morty of Ecruteak Gym!
Th-that’s just incredible!\f
I actually went to the Gym’s entrance
to cheer you on.\f
Did you know that?
But everyone had these candles on\r
their heads, it was kinda creepy...\f
So I chickened out and took off for
home...\f
Call you later!

HGSS.682.0012:
Hey, I heard about you!\f
You saved that Pokémon at the
Lighthouse, didn’t you?\f
[0103,0000,0000], I wish you’d come see me
when I’m sick in bed with a cold!\f
Call you later!
HGSS.682.0013:

[0103,0000,0000], I wish you’d come see me

HGSS.682.0014:
I heard, I heard, I heard!\f
You smashed Team Rocket’s hideout!
You’re like a movie hero, even!\f
But, um... What was Team Rocket?\f
I’m totally out of the loop, aren’t I?

I heard, I heard, I heard!\f

I just wanted to make sure you knew
that you’re awesome!\f
Call you later!

HGSS.682.0018:
I saw, I saw, I saw you, [0103,0000,0000]!
I saw you go into the Dragon’s Den!\f
I’m certain you passed! Aww, no need to
be modest! You can’t fail!\f
Call you later!
HGSS.682.0019:

HGSS.682.0020:
Yesterday, I went out to New Bark
Town. There was a lady who looked a lot\r
like you, [0103,0000,0000].\f
What? That lady was your mom?
Aww, I should’ve introduced myself!\f
I bet your mom’s really proud of all
that you’ve accomplished.\f
Call you later!
HGSS.682.0021:

HGSS.682.0022:
I saw, I saw, I saw!\f
You striding onto a ship, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I can’t get over how good you look with
the sea as your backdrop!\f
I hate having to hang up on you!
Call you later!
HGSS.682.0023:
I saw, I saw, I saw!\f
You striding onto a ship, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I can’t get over how good you look with
the sea as your backdrop!\f
I hate having to hang up on you!
Call you later!
HGSS.682.0024:
I heard, I heard!\f
You got a Magnet Train Pass!\f
When I saw you departing on the ship, I
felt sad that I wouldn’t be able to see\r
you for a while.\f
But since you have that Pass, you can
zip back anytime!\r
That’s reassuring!\f
What? You can Fly back anytime?\f
What do you mean by Fly?\f
Call you later!
HGSS.682.0025:

HGSS.682.0026:
I saw, I saw!\f
You waking up SNORLAX!\f
I was watching you from afar, so I
couldn’t tell what you did exactly.\f
Did you play a flute to wake it?\f
Wow! That’s like magic!
Call you later!

HGSS.682.0028:
[0103,0000,0000], I heard!\f
You’re kicking up a mighty ruckus over
in Kanto!\f
What a glorious rampage it must be!
You so rock!\f
Call you later!

HGSS.682.0030:
I hear gossip about you all over
the place.\f
It just makes me sigh, [0103,0000,0000].
How did you get so strong?\f
Go for the world championship now!
I’ll always be cheering you on!\f
Call you later!\r
...Is that OK?

HGSS.682.0036:

HGSS.682.0039:
I’m so glad you called!\f
I was just about to call you, too!
I guess we must be a good match!
HGSS.682.0040:
How are you?\f
What are you doing?\f
Where are you?\f
How many Badges do you have now?\f
How much money have you saved?\f
How’s your mom?\f
Have you got lots of Pokémon?\f
Is it going to be sunny tomorrow?\f
Arrgh, there’s so much I want to
chat about! This is going nowhere!
